headline: A quiet day with no meetings, emails, or Slack activity — use this uninterrupted time to drive progress on the generated evaluations design doc (AE-1079).

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake auth credentials so dashboards are available for tomorrow
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken; you're flying blind on escalations and product metrics

must_make_progress.task: Draft or substantially advance the 'no ground truth' design doc for generated evaluations (AE-1079)
must_make_progress.why: This is your only active Jira ticket, has no due date set (risk of drifting), and evals is a key 26.4+ deliverable tied to the Agents Big Rock OKR

must_communicate_with.about: Align on technical approach for generated evaluations without ground truth — get their input before finalizing design doc
Coordinate on eval patterns (DeepRAG, BatchTransform) and how no-ground-truth evals fit into the validation story

agents_in_production.vs_goal: Snowflake auth broken — fix credentials to restore visibility

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations or high-priority cases. Fix urgently.
Snowflake metrics connection is down (empty password) — no telemetry or funnel data available.
AE-1079 has no due date set — risk of it slipping without a target; consider setting one today.
Autopilot is flagged Yellow/Risk in the Agents Big Rock — monitor for any spillover impact on evals work.

outcomes.business_impact: No measurable business impact yet today — priority is restoring observability (Salesforce/Snowflake) and advancing the evals design doc that supports the Agents Big Rock.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics are unavailable due to broken Snowflake connection; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc (AE-1079) is the key adoption-driving work item for generated evaluations.

slack_summary: Quiet day: no meetings, no emails, no Slack activity — ideal deep work window. Top priority: make real progress on the generated evaluations 'no ground truth' design doc (AE-1079), your only active Jira ticket. Second: fix broken Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so you're not blind on escalations and product metrics. Zero meetings today.
